productDisplayName: Lino Perros Men Leather Brown Wallet
description: Crafted from leather, this brown wallet from lino perros is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed man. Carry your monetary essentials with ease in this classic wallet. Dimensions: 9 cm x 11 cm Has two main compartments Three card slots on the left side An id card pocket on the left with three card slots at the back Four card slots on the right side Two insert pockets on either side Brand name embossed on the top Care Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
